name: It is obvious that He Who is invested with the best attributes cannot be appreciative of
introduction:
those possessed of low and evil qualities. God is, for instance, Generous and Beneficent, and
constantly showers His favours and bounties on His creatures. How is it possible for Him,
then, to love those who are mean, niggardly and vicious?
